# wordpress_plugin_info (Data Source )

Reads public plugin metadata from the WordPress.org plugin registry by slug. This resource does not require a WordPress site to be configured, as it reads data from the WordPress.org plugin registry. If you only use this data source, you can pass empty values for the provider configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "wordpress_plugin_info" "woocommerce" {
  slug = "woocommerce"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) WordPress.org plugin slug, such as `woocommerce`.

### Read-Only

- `active_installs` (Number)
- `author` (String)
- `author_profile` (String)
- `download_link` (String)
- `homepage` (String)
- `last_updated` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `num_ratings` (Number)
- `rating` (Number)
- `requires` (String)
- `requires_php` (String)
- `short_description` (String)
- `tested` (String)
- `version` (String)
